# Pull Request

## Type

- [ ] New problem
- [ ] Fix existing problem
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe what this PR does in one or two sentences.

## Problem folder

If this is a new problem, what is the folder name?

`src/problems/`

## Checklist

- [ ] The problem is reproducible without extra setup
- [ ] A `README.md` is included in the problem folder
- [ ] The solution is not included
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies were added
- [ ] The project builds without errors
